title: ophrys × castroviejoi
intro: Ophrys × castroviejoi is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Ophrys bombyliflora and Ophrys scutiflora, and is commonly known as the 'Castro's Bee Orchid'. This plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ophrys × castroviejoi include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of Ophrys × castroviejoi are typically made from the plant's flowers or roots, and can be administered in various forms, such as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures.
